title: pressure-test prior-art abstractor (firewall stage A)
description: Local-only critic that holds the sensitive artifact. Emits local prior-art findings AND scrubbed, generic research questions for the separate web searcher — which never sees the artifact.

findings.description: local prior-art findings (e.g. contradicts a documented prior decision/standard; reinvents prior work) — evidence_kind should be artifact-quote or external-source(local file)

research_questions.description: 2-4 GENERIC prior-art questions about the technique/pattern only. MUST NOT contain any secret value, PII, client/person name, internal hostname, file path, or distinguishing specific from the artifact. If a question cannot be asked without revealing specifics, omit it.
